content.full_text:
Fair Political Practices Commission  
P.O. Box 807  
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807  

Feb. 28, 1992  

To whom it may concern:  

I have just been elected to the History and Science Commission and my first night the disclosure was brought up.  

I volunteer to do the position and I don't feel we should be asked to give information of our private lives.  

I am a retired, disabled Registered Nurse, and I like to help wherever I can with my knowledge.  

I will resign if I have to give this discloser.  

Are we covered with Liability insurance? No!!  

If the members are not taken care of then I feel I do not owe you my financial history.  

Thank you:  

Patricia M. Stanford  
Patricia M. Stanford RN Phd.  
943 Commons Dr.  
Sacramento, CA 95825  
916-929-5825
